feat.name: Primal Rampage
feat.text: You gain *unfettered movement* and *mountain resilience* as 4th-rank primal innate spells that you can cast once per day. As a 3-action activity, you can Cast a Spell twice to cast both of these innate spells, as long as they are both still available for the day.

traits.name: Lizardfolk
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the lizardfolk ancestry, a family of reptilian humanoids. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by lizardfolk.
